name: @insolvia/marketing
//: @insolvia-ai/design-system lives in devDependencies on purpose: it is
bundled into the SSR build at build time (vite.config.ts ssr.noExternal),
so the runtime never imports it — and keeping it out of `dependencies` is
what lets the Docker image's `npm ci --omit=dev` skip it and stay free of
GitHub Packages registry auth. Installing it here DOES need auth (see
.npmrc). A file: path override for local design-system hacking is fine,
but never commit it — the committed dep is the published package.
